sparse-kappa documentation
==========================

``sparse-kappa`` is a sparse matrix condition number estimation library with PyTorch acceleration,
covering both numerical algorithms and optional GNN-based prediction workflows.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Getting started

   installation
   quickstart

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: User guide

   user_guide
   methods
   algorithms
   examples
   performance
   troubleshooting

   :caption: API reference

   api/index

   :maxdepth: 1
   :caption: Project

   contributing
   changelog
